changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'purchase:read', 'purchase', 'read', 'Read purchase orders and supplier invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'purchase:write', 'purchase', 'write', 'Create/update/cancel purchase orders and supplier invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'purchase:receive', 'purchase', 'receive', 'Receive purchase orders into stock') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
